shared_properties: Platform footprint remains 48x16 px so riders have exactly three 16 px tiles of landing space.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while moss and stone colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Top collision strip occupies the upper 4 px with readable stone lip highlights across both frames.
differences: Two frames alternate moss strands and chain sway by 1 px to keep the moving platform alive without changing its collision outline.
Underside chain anchors extend 3 px below the slab to signal a suspended traversal surface.
The authored surface reads as medium friction through moss-green top fill rather than slick blue or bare purple stone.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 48x16 moving platform size, 60 px per second lateral motion, and mossy medium-friction role inside later shaft zones.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the damp dungeon material language and hanging platform silhouette needed for mid-run traversal variety.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player-to-platform scale so the 16x24 prisoner has a believable standing footprint on the 48x16 slab.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for static hazards or SpriteSheetBundle for animated hazards, all rendered with nearest-neighbor sampling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load hazard textures and atlases during the shared Loading state and expose handles through HazardVisualRegistry keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Keep collision volumes in gameplay components rather than inferring them from visual pixels.
Align every hazard origin to the 16x16 grid unless the authored size is 24x24 or 48x16 by design.
Use visibility toggles or atlas index changes instead of runtime texture swaps to avoid hitching during repeated descent loops.

context.usage: Horizontal traversal surface used from the puddle layer onward.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 96x16 px with 2 frames of 48x16 px and 0 px spacing.
Top surface contains a continuous 48 px landing strip with no holes larger than 1 px.
Frame-to-frame animation changes only decorative moss and chain pixels while the collision outline remains identical.
